name: IFTTT-style Rule
description: Build a simple if-this-then-that rule. Pick a trigger (cron/webhook/sensor), pick an action (send msg/run skill/api call), save. Persists to localStorage and registers via /api/event-triggers.

placeholders.name: REPLACE_WITH_ACTION
placeholders.description: Default action (e.g. 'send me a slack message')
